programme.title: E1 - Lost Soul In Lafayette
programme.desc: When the body of free-spirited Bonnie Ruphard, 47, is spotted by a runner in Lafayette, LA, police suspect domestic violence.

programme.desc: A traveling nurse is pulled over for a traffic violation in New Mexico and is arrested for felony burglary carried out in her home state of Ohio. Is she a thug for hire or innocent with a rock-solid alibi?

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. programme.title: Special Delivery
programme.desc: “I deliver everything that the post office service does not handle.” Eun-ha, who is a normal junkyard employee, secretly works as a delivery clerk that deals with unusual delivery request. One day, Eun-ha heads to Seoul to pick up a client who is involved in a gambling crime that wants to flee overseas. However, Eun-ha meets the client's young son at the pick-up point, instead of the client himself. Kyung-pil, a current police officer who is actually masterminding the whole gambling crime, chases after the missing child who has the security key to the bank account that holds 30 million dollars. After a long pursuit from Seoul to Busan, Eun-ha fights against the police to protect the child!

programme.title: Coffin Homes
programme.desc: Three bizarre tales intertwine in this horror satire set against the housing crisis of Hong Kong, in which the soaring property prices have driven dwellers to take every insane effort necessary to secure a cramped space, even if it means sharing the same roof with the dead.

programme.title: Mount CHIAK
programme.desc: Members of 'GO2MOUNTAIN' bike riding club try valleys of Mount CHIAK where unreal too-cleanly-cut mutilation murders happened. Moments of freedom riding the mountain, odd things happen around them. Will they survive through what that haunts?

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: This is a story between the mole in the police department, Ming(Andy Lau) and the undercover cop, Yan(Tony Leung), who are competing to uncover each other first...

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E276 -Atonement
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: E212 - Date Night / Behind the Jingle
programme.desc: Will and Min's date ends up in a rideshare turf war. At home, Halmoni throws a party as the kids try to prove they can watch themselves. // The family gets famous after their Groom & Board Jingle hits #1. But fame is fickle and tears them apart.

programme.title: E704 - Bye, Bye, Birthday / Tough Guise
programme.desc: Tired of the yearly cheer surrounding her birthday, Lucy casts a spell so her family will forget what day it is. // When Zach is given detention, Rusty and the rest of their friends try to toughen up him up so he'll fit in.

programme.title: E802 - Be Careful What you Fish For
programme.desc: A fishing trip with Gramps turns into an obsessive chase when Gramps' old fish rival, Moby Rick, swims nearby.

programme.title: E222 - Lay Lay Gets Ready to Rumble Rumble
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are enlisted to help save the school's boxing club, and set up a fight between Sadie and Gigi that is sure to draw a crowd. Now all that's left to do is train Sadie to fight. How hard can it be?

programme.title: E313 - Squidina's Holidaze Special
programme.desc: Squidina has to direct her school holiday play, but her script was mangled by Patrick.

programme.title: E401 - Sitcom Stars / The Show Must Go Yawn
programme.desc: When Cecil's boss visits the house, the Stars get trapped in a sitcom. // When Squidina is bedridden, Patrick has to run his show without her.

programme.title: E264 - Plankton's Intern / Patrick's Tantrum
programme.desc: Plankton needs help stealing the formula, so he hires an intern who knows more about Mr. Krabs than anyone. // Patrick goes into a destructive fit whenever he hears a bell, so his friends help him in their own ways.

programme.title: E107 - Not So Fast and Furious
programme.desc: A new super-fast villain is wreaking havoc in Secret Shores, and Billy is the only hope at tracking her down. After Billy's speed accidentally triggers an avalanche, however, he decides to hang up his cape and retire from being a superhero.

programme.title: E314 - Jeffy T's Prankwell Emporium / A Taste of Plankton
programme.desc: Squidward's prankster dad visits and brings all sorts of gags with him (much to Squidward's annoyance). // Plankton tries to get a taste of the secret formula by attaching himself to SpongeBob's tongue.

programme.title: E401 - Sitcom Stars / The Show Must Go Yawn
programme.desc: When Cecil's boss visits the house, the Stars get trapped in a sitcom. // When Squidina is bedridden, Patrick has to run his show without her.

programme.title: E421 - On Thin Ice / Room and Hoard
programme.desc: Lynn's extreme sports superstitions cause chaos at a professional hockey match. // Unable to part with their childhood toys, the kids try to convince Mom and Dad that they still play with them.

programme.title: E214 - Patrick's Coupon / Out of the Picture
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he'll have to get to the store if he wants to use it! // Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he'll have to get the artist out of the picture!

programme.title: E222 - Lay Lay Gets Ready to Rumble Rumble
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are enlisted to help save the school's boxing club, and set up a fight between Sadie and Gigi that is sure to draw a crowd. Now all that's left to do is train Sadie to fight. How hard can it be?

programme.title: E511 - School of Shock / Elecshunned
programme.desc: Lisa takes over her first-grade classroom and learns that there's more to teaching than just knowing facts. // Leni goes toe-to-toe with the Mayor in a city-wide Royal Woods election.

programme.title: E221 - No Pictures, Please / Stuck on the Roof
programme.desc: Patrick leads an enthusiastic stranger on a tour of his favorite places in Bikini Bottom. // SpongeBob is afraid to get off the roof of the Krusty Krab, but he won't let that stop him from living his life!

programme.title: E511 - School of Shock / Elecshunned
programme.desc: Lisa takes over her first-grade classroom and learns that there's more to teaching than just knowing facts. // Leni goes toe-to-toe with the Mayor in a city-wide Royal Woods election.

programme.desc: Lisa takes over her first-grade classroom and learns that there's more to teaching than just knowing facts. // Leni goes toe-to-toe with the Mayor in a city-wide Royal Woods election.

programme.title: Buddha In Traffic Jam
programme.desc: A carefree student is drawn into a professor's radical ideology and becomes entangled in campus politics, manipulation, and hidden agendas that gradually put his beliefs and life at risk.

programme.title: Bol Radha Bol
programme.desc: Kishan returns to revive his father's factory and falls in love, but someone has taken his place back home, drawing him into danger and unexpected rivalry. Release Year: 1992 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Buddha In Traffic Jam
programme.desc: A carefree student is drawn into a professor's radical ideology and becomes entangled in campus politics, manipulation, and hidden agendas that gradually put his beliefs and life at risk.

programme.title: Buddha In Traffic Jam
programme.desc: A carefree student is drawn into a professor's radical ideology and becomes entangled in campus politics, manipulation, and hidden agendas that gradually put his beliefs and life at risk.

programme.title: Day of the Decoration
programme.desc: Ricky is redecorating. He makes some Escher-inspired wallpaper and uses paint-filled balloons to help add color to Sarah's flat! But it wasn't the kind of painting Sarah had hoped for!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Trip to Alaska
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are making ice cream when Alim arrives with a smoked herring, ready to add it in. The kids protest-fish in ice cream? Alim challenges them and takes them to Alaska, where Jamie shows them that traditional ice cream there is made with seal fat and fish!

programme.title: Make A Wish
programme.desc: Carol once tricked her dad Frank into believing shooting star wishes come true-by secretly making them happen. Now his wild wishes keep coming, from giant cakes to robots. But when he wishes to join Motor & Flippy's band, there's a problem: he really can't sing!

programme.title: How Do Satellites Help Us Navigate?
programme.desc: Early pioneers explored the world using mathematics to navigate by the sun and the stars. By measuring their relation to key points on Earth, they could travel great distances. But how did mathematics help us make the jump into the age of satellite navigation?

programme.title: Tension and Chemical Kinetics
programme.desc: What exactly is surface tension? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of materials science. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with liquid detergent, and get to know Yuan T. Lee, a chemist, known for his advances in kinetics of chemical reactions.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Sneezy Snufflies
programme.desc: When Mrs. Rorschach suddenly develops an allergy, every indictor points to Mr. Tiggles as the cause. Addison has to solve the mystery before Mrs. Rorschach and her kitty are forced to part ways forever!

programme.title: Conductivity
programme.desc: An accident rescuing a piece of toast from the toaster leads Smorph to find out how some materials conduct electricity and some do not.

programme.title: Shoe
programme.desc: Hepi and Briko reuse shoes to make some cute DIYs

programme.title: Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: It's ‘toy drive' time, but Oto is having a hard time parting with anything – even a little old toy plane he forgot he had. Anabella thinks the plane is worthless, but Oto thinks it's valuable! Is Oto's plane junk, or a treasure?

programme.title: Ultra Super Magic Working Juice
programme.desc: DiktaThor has invented a ultra-super-magic working juice that everyone in Bhilka wants to get their hands on. But is it really fantastic or just a lie?

programme.title: Environmental Science
programme.desc: How do sea animals stay warm in extreme cold? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of environmental science. Have hands-on fun by creating a blubber glove, and get to know Rachel Carson, a marine biologist and chief advocate of global environmentalism.

programme.title: Do Fish Drink Water?
programme.desc: It's summer at the beach, and while enjoying coconut water, Luna wonders if fish drink water. With Jupiter and Clyde, she imagines being a fish and dives into the ocean to find out how fish really get the water they need.

programme.title: Trade Route
programme.desc: Howler and Little Lewis take us on an excursion down the medieval trade routes. The journey is anything but a walk in the park for these two wine merchants! In the Middle Ages, being a salesman takes a lot of guts!

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Flippy's shoes
programme.desc: Robbie and Flippy get into some serious rivalry over who's better at basketball and organise a showdown. Flippy's new trainers turn out to have powers that give him the edge; he looks certain to win, until it all goes wrong.

programme.title: How Does a Rocket Escape Earth's Gravity
programme.desc: Leaving our planet and entering space is extremely difficult, requiring complex mathematics to calculate the amount of opposing force to escape the Earth's gravity. Just try jumping upwards. So how does mathematics help rockets beat gravity and shoot out into space?

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Compass
programme.desc: Henry meets a compass in a Nautical History Museum. Compass never got the chance to discover a new and exciting land.

programme.title: Stuck on Style
programme.desc: Mundi enjoys making duct-tape accessories. Anabella loves them, but the others aren't so keen! Anabella suggests they model them in a fashion show in Paris, France, to see if Mundi's accessories are fashionable.

programme.title: Vispy Kharadi: Martial Arts Strong Man
programme.desc: Serial GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS record-breaker and skilled martial artist Vispy Kharadi reveals what it takes to become the best and demonstrates some martial arts moves and self-defense techniques.

programme.title: The Pitmans: Martial Arts Dynamic Duo
programme.desc: Lisa and Chris Pitman are a married couple who hold the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most concrete blocks broken in thirty seconds by a mixed team of two. The couple shares what it takes to become the best in the world in martial arts.

programme.title: Why We Explore
programme.desc: Host Emily Calandrelli makes the case for space exploration. Astronauts have reported a profound change in perspective when looking back at the earth from space, which they believe could change the world if experienced by others.

programme.title: True Bromance
programme.desc: Artistic gymnasts Alice and Erin team up with trampolinists Morgan and Evie on a mission to save the planet. And Seb and Shakiem have a big competition looming, so they are having a motivational sleepover before heading to the British Tumbling Championships.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Going, Going, Gone
programme.desc: It's ‘toy drive' time, but Oto is having a hard time parting with anything – even a little old toy plane he forgot he had. Anabella thinks the plane is worthless, but Oto thinks it's valuable! Is Oto's plane junk, or a treasure?

programme.title: Zhi Financial News
programme.desc: Zhi Financial News is a daily news program on Shenzhen TV. The 10-minute show covers global financial headlines and offers authoritative insights into the latest economic trends.

programme.title: Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.title: Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area
programme.desc: “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” is a bilingual interview program on Shenzhen TV that focuses on in-depth exploration and research. With a global perspective on the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, it captures cutting-edge trends in economic and trade exchanges, technological innovation, cultural trends, and more between China and the world. Through on-site research and interviews, the program engages in conversations with leaders from government, business, technology, and cultural sectors. It showcases technological achievements, trends in economic and trade exchanges, and mutual learning in civilization exchanges. Since its inception over two years ago, “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” has aired more than a hundred episodes of specialized interviews. The program integrates prominent international figures into the Greater Bay Area, where guests draw from their personal experiences living and working in the area or provide professional perspectives o

programme.title: French Connections
programme.desc: French Connections revolves around France, its top stories and news, its experience in various spheres and cultural life, sport events, health care and education, cuisine and so much more. Find out what is like to live in France, get to know its regions, and feel the true taste of France.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Eye On Africa
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. programme.title: French Connections
programme.desc: French Connections revolves around France, its top stories and news, its experience in various spheres and cultural life, sport events, health care and education, cuisine and so much more. Find out what is like to live in France, get to know its regions, and feel the true taste of France.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E3 - The Partners
programme.desc: Meet a golden retriever that assuages anxiety and helps heal PTSD, a shepherd mix who rescues mudslide survivors, a pair of spaniels who sniff out underground water leaks, and a group of teacher’s pets in the UK that assist children learning to read.

programme.title: E4 - The Protectors
programme.desc: A blind woman has found a new lease on life thanks to her canine running mate, a Jack Russell works as a super-nanny to a surprising array of species, and a team of dogs in Kenya are on daily patrol protecting endangered rhinos from poachers.

programme.title: E3 - Kesi Turns a Corner
programme.desc: Watch a milestone moment when two students get their first forest time in years. And another pair of students are confined to the school’s clinic after an accident in the forest leaves Beni with a broken leg and Lala with a broken elbow.

programme.title: E2 - Secret Life of the Emu
programme.desc: The Emu is Australia’s biggest native bird and is the second largest bird in the world after the African ostrich: two meters tall, with an almost three metre running stride and totally flightless. This bird inhabits a topsy turvy world, where females call the shots, eggs are green and men do all the work to produce and raise tiny babies, known as Stripeys.

programme.title: E3 - The Partners
programme.desc: Meet a golden retriever that assuages anxiety and helps heal PTSD, a shepherd mix who rescues mudslide survivors, a pair of spaniels who sniff out underground water leaks, and a group of teacher’s pets in the UK that assist children learning to read.

programme.title: E4 - The Protectors
programme.desc: A blind woman has found a new lease on life thanks to her canine running mate, a Jack Russell works as a super-nanny to a surprising array of species, and a team of dogs in Kenya are on daily patrol protecting endangered rhinos from poachers.

programme.title: E5 - Chasing Scales
programme.desc: Storm into a new suburb, where the wranglers keep deadly snakes from slipping into family homes. Watch as Stu and Liv pull an eastern brown from a job site, Jess and Dan expel a python from a shed, and Mick and Adele evict a red belly from a bedroom.

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: E406 - The Crew Fixes The Observatory
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are ready to replace the broken telescope lens at the Observatory. Until it starts a fiery fiasco during delivery!

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned...

programme.title: E230 - Cuckoo Clock
programme.desc: Daddy Pig winds up the old cuckoo clock. When a wooden cuckoo pops out singing “Cuckoo!”, Peppa thinks it is very funny, but George has missed the whole thing. George does not want to miss the cuckoo again but the cuckoo only pops out once an hour.

programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E406 - The Crew Fixes The Observatory
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are ready to replace the broken telescope lens at the Observatory. Until it starts a fiery fiasco during delivery!

programme.title: E203 - Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on 'Thesee', a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: E205 - Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: E309 - The Crew Builds An Art Museum / The Crew Builds A Giant Alphorn
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum! // Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: E201 - Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the 'BAM'.

programme.title: E107 - Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: E801 - The Pirate Grand Prix
programme.desc: It's Pegwheel the pirate's first race-and who better to join him than Pirate Blaze! Can they beat Crusher to the trophy and prove they're the best racers on the seven seas, or will strong winds and high altitudes get the better of them?

programme.title: E204 - The Crew Builds Library Treasure Tunnels / The Crew Builds A Super Snack Di
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew's favorite book series has new additions! But when there's no room for them in the library, the pups have to get creative.// The pups have a surprise just for Rubble... a snack dispenser! But will they finish it before Rubble finds out?

programme.title: E915 - Pups Save A T-Rex Tyke / Pups Save A Playful Elephant Calf
programme.desc: When a baby T-Rex gets lost, Ryder and the pups go on a daring mission to the Dino Wilds to help find him. // When Everest joins the Paw Patrol for a visit to the jungle, she makes friends with a clumsy elephant calf and then must help rescue him.

programme.title: E212 - Chompy And The Cloud Flower
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Chompy find another Cloud Flower Seed after he accidentally eats Isa's.

programme.title: E843 - Mr Bull The Teacher
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle must go to the dentist so leaves the class with Mr Bull. The children already know the subjects Mr Bull suggests teaching, so he decides to show them how to fix a squeaky floorboard.

programme.title: E845 - Poems
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle introduces the children to poetry, explaining how sounds can be poems too. Together they make a poem about rain and perform it to the parents.

programme.title: E405 - Pups Save A Sleepover / Pups Save The Carnival
programme.desc: Farmer Al's animals go missing during a sleepover. // Cornelius has escaped from the pig ride at the carnival, and the prizes have gone missing too!

programme.title: E607 - Pups Save Gustavo's Guitar / Pups Save The Yoga Goats
programme.desc: Gustavo Goodway's guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight's campfire concert! // Farmer Yumi's new Yoga Goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing! It's up to the Paw Patrol to find the goats and return them to Yumi's farm.

programme.title: E201 - Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the 'BAM'.

programme.title: E230 - Cuckoo Clock
programme.desc: Daddy Pig winds up the old cuckoo clock. When a wooden cuckoo pops out singing “Cuckoo!”, Peppa thinks it is very funny, but George has missed the whole thing. George does not want to miss the cuckoo again but the cuckoo only pops out once an hour.

programme.title: E310 - Pups Save A Stinky Flower / Pups Save A Monkey-Naut
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger drops off a ‘gift' to Mayor Goodway, a flower that spreads a horrible stink when it blooms. // Mayor Goodway tries to return it to him, but runs into trouble and has to be rescued by the Paw Patrol.

programme.title: E805 - Pups Save The Funhouse
programme.desc: When a carnival train gets stuck in a tunnel, it results in a mountainside funhouse-style wild ride.

programme.title: E203 - Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on 'Thesee', a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: E203 - Summer Camp I / Summer Camp II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama have announced to their dear barbababies that they are going on a trip to Easter Island. // The Barbababies, the twins, and Mr. Strict set sail on 'Thesee', a magnificent sailboat.

programme.title: E205 - Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: E205 - Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: E309 - The Crew Builds An Art Museum / The Crew Builds A Giant Alphorn
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum! // Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: E5 - Land Of Innovators
programme.desc: India's spirit of inquiry and scientific temper has led innovation in countless ways. Leading industrialists examine India's engineering marvels.

E18
programme.desc: Aparajita, an artist with a past, and Rakshit, a reserved businessman wary of love, meet. Their relationship faces challenges, but friendship and hope may spark romance.

programme.title: E93
programme.desc: Shivprasad and Shalini, an ordinary married couple, embrace love, laughter, and everyday joys, weaving a simple yet fulfilling life that celebrates togetherness and quiet contentment.

programme.title: E785
programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.title: E2011

programme.title: Low Testosterone: What It Does To Men's Health
programme.desc: Hormone imbalances can impact metabolism, mental health, and sexual function. What causes the drop - and which treatments can help? Plus: The mysterious prostate gland, hair loss, and anorexia in men.

programme.title: US Troop Withdrawal: A Turning Point For Europe?
programme.desc: It's not going great for Europe: militarily and economically, the continent is under growing pressure. And the US President is showing little appetite to help out. Donald Trump stays true to his motto: America First. Can Europe stand on its own? Our guests: Brandon Bohrn (Bertelsmann Stiftung), Gustav Gressel (military expert), Rachel Tausendfreund (German Council on Foreign Relations)

programme.title: Spiked - The Insidious Use Of Knockout Drops
programme.desc: Knockout drops: colorless, tasteless and extremely dangerous. They've been around for decades and are used to incapacitate people in order to rob, rape and even kill them.

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: Sunshine Cops
programme.desc: In order to enhance a fresh image, the police force selects O and Sammy as 'Sunshine Cops'. But the campaign is not met with the anticipated popularity...

programme.title: Summer Holiday
programme.desc: Summer flies to an island to sell a resort that is invested by her and her cousin. She meets Momocha who claims to be the authentic owner of the hotel. They begin a battle of love...

programme.title: Tempting Heart
programme.desc: Ho-jun is a shy youngster, more interested in his guitar than school. A chance encounter between Ho-jun and Sheo-rou leads to a first sweet taste of romance. However...

programme.title: Warrior Mothers: Fighting For Love
programme.desc: Tung Choi is the third-generation shop owner of a string of beef noodle restaurants. He gets into a minor fender bender with the hard working, yet outwardly mean Deborah. The two engage in an ill-tempered spat which makes both characters seem completely unlikable. Meeting later to negotiate a truce, the two end up engaging in a one-night stand, but a happy ending is far from possible. Tung is linked to high-maintenance TV personality Mindy, and Deborah is about to encounter a fitting fall from grace. Thanks to her mean-spirited behavior, she loses her job, her home (she and her father have a spat), and possibly her self-respect. Deborah and Tung encounter each other at the hospital, where Tung is visiting his mother and Deborah is staying (as in sleeping on the floor) with her sister. Tung offers to let her freshen up at his home, but she ends up sleeping on the couch for a short period of time. Tung's extremely weird family seems against Deborah; they tout Mindy's positive p

programme.title: NIGHT LIFE HERO
programme.desc: Zhan's family was very rich, but his wife died early. He and his daughter Baby depended on each other. Zhan liked dancing in nightclub which his daughter opposed. Therefore, she dressed up to work in the nightclub in order to make her dad mad. A gangster had an interest in Baby, but fortunately Cong came forward to help. Baby and Cong developed feelings for each other. Baby used her wealth to help Cong with his career, but when Cong found out that his career was helped by Baby secretly, it was difficult for him to accept. How should Cong decide?

programme.title: E99
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E15 - Better Understanding The Origin Of Food
programme.desc: How can you know where the food you buy comes from? Also in the summary: a review of rice cookers, maple brandy, the first maple eau-de-vie.

programme.title: E3 - My Cabin In Alaska
programme.desc: Nicolas Reymond, mountain guide and carpenter specialising in building log cabins, fell in love with Alaska during a visit twenty-five years ago. Since then, he has spent his life between Switzerland and the USA where he built himself a log cabin in the middle of nowhere...

programme.title: E10 - Schools/Ai/Reblochon/Table Tennis
programme.desc: In the summary: students searched at the entrance of schools in France; how to regulate the use of AI by students; the reblochon industry seeking to adapt; table tennis played with frying pans.

programme.title: E7 - I Wish I Had Another Chance
programme.desc: The Emerald Apple Festival is back and so is a mysterious wish from the town’s festive past. Daniel and Paula revive the traditional apple cart race.

programme.title: E21 - Bright Lights, Black Hearts
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max stop by the graveyard set of Gwen's favourite TV show, The Unalivers. Before long, Ben discovers its lead, Michael Morningstar, is an energy vampire.

programme.title: E24 - Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: During Chefapalooza in the Rocky Mountains, three famous chefs and infamous bad-guys, The Tri-Chefta, hunt down Wildvine in hopes of creating their most exotic dish to date.

programme.title: E21 - The Heavy Sleeper
programme.desc: When Chowder accidentally puts Mung into a deep sleep, he and Shnitzel must try and wake him before Truffles finds out.

programme.title: E24 - Chowder & Mr. Fugu
programme.desc: When Mung's best customer enlists Chowder to be his valet for the day, Chowder soon realizes he's met the one person who can eat more than him.

programme.title: E16 - Free Philly
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

programme.title: E17 - Tamika And The Beast
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: E353
programme.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. Each episode follows prominent CEOs, entertainers, and professionals as they go about their daily routines and interact with their employees. Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programme.title: E2 - Bangkok
programme.desc: It may be the backpacker's must-see, but if you go to the Venice of the East, don't drive!

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E9 - Bighorn Range
programme.desc: Bighorn sheep are captured and translocated in the mountains of Nevada.

programme.title: E10 - Preserving a Predator
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and translocate lions across Africa to replenish a once-extinct population.

programme.title: E1 - Mexico
programme.desc: On a wild and dangerous adventure to Mexico, BMX bikers Rooftop and Catfish test how gutsy they really are. The pair go from racing bikes to racing donkeys, flame throwing and tricking in pointy shoes on the streets, to loosing their breakfast trying to eat eyeball tacos for lunch. But the duo’s bravery (or stupidity) doesn’t end there. They compete in a rodeo, milk a snake for its venom, spin upside down as Voladores in a traditional rain ceremony, and get tattoos right before diving into the city’s toxic sewage. With all of these dauntless activities the question becomes, can Rooftop and Catfish make it out of Mexico in one piece?

programme.title: E2 - Romania
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish’s travels take them to Romania, where the daredevil acts continue. After a chariot race in the countryside, the BMX bikers continue their attempt to become Romanian gladiators by flying through the air, jumping through flaming walls, and even lighting themselves on fire while riding their bikes. They get up close and personal with the sheep of the country, trying the Romanian delicacy of sheep’s head, but quickly move on to just milking the animal. Finally, the trip to this Eastern European country is not complete without trying to clean up the streets from Romania’s stray dog epidemic. Are Rooftop and Catfish able to save the strays or does the duo learn that they are all bark and no bite?

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Le rendez-vous de l'Afrique[Live]
programme.desc: Direction l'Afrique avec ce rendez-vous quotidien qui suit l'actualité du continent en compagnie des correspondants locaux et des invités en plateau.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.desc: Zoom In: Pay attention to current political topics, major social events and news hot spots. Dig out more facts and backgrounds. Analyze the early consequences of news events, the fate of characters, and present authoritative views.
SUMMARY OF PRESS: Providing a concise review of what's in the press, the show highlights the important news by presenting newspaper headlines and editorial from respected.
Chief Editor's Time: Daily key issues around the world are discussed on Chief Editor's Time. In-depth analyses and discussion gives viewers a better understanding of the issue.

programme.title: E1167
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.
In the summer of 1961, two baseball players and best friends compete to beat the home run record set by legendary Babe Ruth in 1927.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: Savdhaan India -Naya Adhyay
programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.desc: Zain Asher and Bianna Golodryga cover the top global and national issues of the day.

programme.title: CNN Newsroom: Friday, May 8, 2026 3Am ET
programme.desc: Live context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: World Sport: Friday, May 8, 2026 145Am ET
programme.desc: Daily sports show features major stories and issues making news in the world of sports.

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E1 - Let's Play All The Best Games!
programme.desc: It's time to play all the best games with Kii & Yii! The fun begins with a high-stakes game of Red Light, Green Light, where Jeepbot is 'It' with a slime cannon blaster! Then, Kii & Yii play a fun game of life-size Snakes & Ladders, complete with toy snakes & big ladders. The competition continues with a game of Duck, Duck, Goose in mini race cars & a summer pool party game of Marco Polo with Snappy Croc!

programme.title: E1 - Let's Play All The Best Games!
programme.desc: It's time to play all the best games with Kii & Yii! The fun begins with a high-stakes game of Red Light, Green Light, where Jeepbot is 'It' with a slime cannon blaster! Then, Kii & Yii play a fun game of life-size Snakes & Ladders, complete with toy snakes & big ladders. The competition continues with a game of Duck, Duck, Goose in mini race cars & a summer pool party game of Marco Polo with Snappy Croc!

programme.title: E1 - Gecko's Genius Outdoor Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko is using his genius for some amazing outdoor fixes! On a rainy camping trip, Green Mechanical runs out of battery, so Gecko & Grandma create a water wheel from scratch to recharge her with green energy! Then, when Mr. Weasel's advertising blimp starts to fly away with him attached, Gecko must use a bouncy castle to prepare a soft landing! From finding lost keys in a sandcastle to stopping Max from getting stuck in the mud, Gecko can fix it all!

programme.title: E2 - Awesome Baby Truck Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby Truck for some awesome adventures at Gecko's Garage! The fun begins with a play date where Baby Truck & the Mechs take an imaginary trip to outer space, modifying Baby Truck into a rocket to explore the galaxy! Then, after getting a boo boo in the play park, the Mechanicals try to make her laugh but she can't stop giggling! The adventure ends when Mummy Truck is exhausted & Gecko gives her a spa day while Baby Truck has a fun art class with Grandma.

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E2 - Awesome Baby Truck Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby Truck for some awesome adventures at Gecko's Garage! The fun begins with a play date where Baby Truck & the Mechs take an imaginary trip to outer space, modifying Baby Truck into a rocket to explore the galaxy! Then, after getting a boo boo in the play park, the Mechanicals try to make her laugh but she can't stop giggling! The adventure ends when Mummy Truck is exhausted & Gecko gives her a spa day while Baby Truck has a fun art class with Grandma.

programme.title: E2 - Awesome Baby Truck Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby Truck for some awesome adventures at Gecko's Garage! The fun begins with a play date where Baby Truck & the Mechs take an imaginary trip to outer space, modifying Baby Truck into a rocket to explore the galaxy! Then, after getting a boo boo in the play park, the Mechanicals try to make her laugh but she can't stop giggling! The adventure ends when Mummy Truck is exhausted & Gecko gives her a spa day while Baby Truck has a fun art class with Grandma.

programme.title: E1 - Gecko's Genius Outdoor Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko is using his genius for some amazing outdoor fixes! On a rainy camping trip, Green Mechanical runs out of battery, so Gecko & Grandma create a water wheel from scratch to recharge her with green energy! Then, when Mr. Weasel's advertising blimp starts to fly away with him attached, Gecko must use a bouncy castle to prepare a soft landing! From finding lost keys in a sandcastle to stopping Max from getting stuck in the mud, Gecko can fix it all!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & bedtime songs! Mummy helps Mia begin her nighttime routine by tucking her toys into cozy spaces. Then, they try out some super simple & calming animal-related yoga poses to help Mia have a restful sleep. Daddy also shows Mia that routines can be fun with his 'brush your teeth dance'! Finally, Mummy & Daddy play a beautiful lullaby on their guitars to help soothe the kids to sleep under the twinkling stars.

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E1 - Let's Play All The Best Games!
programme.desc: It's time to play all the best games with Kii & Yii! The fun begins with a high-stakes game of Red Light, Green Light, where Jeepbot is 'It' with a slime cannon blaster! Then, Kii & Yii play a fun game of life-size Snakes & Ladders, complete with toy snakes & big ladders. The competition continues with a game of Duck, Duck, Goose in mini race cars & a summer pool party game of Marco Polo with Snappy Croc!

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.
